tools.name: Go Build Pulse Loop
tools.persona: backend Go developer using repeated build and test loops
tools.problem: Backend Go developers running repeated build and test cycles lose about 48 minutes per day because compilation and build feedback stays slow across local development and CI-linked workflows.
tools.solution: A single-screen HTML/JS utility that parses pasted build timing output, ranks slowest steps, recommends the next best optimization action, and supports before/after comparison.

result.summary: 48 minutes estimated time loss per day detected and 17 minutes estimated time saved per day estimated.

usage: Apply the top recommendation and compare before and after.

tools.name: Copilot Change Watch
tools.problem: Developers lose time when GitHub and Copilot features appear, disappear, or change across plans and surfaces without a clear comparison record.
tools.solution: A single-screen HTML/JS utility that converts scattered feature observations into a concise change brief that can be shared immediately.

result.summary: 1 consolidated change brief generated from pasted observations.

usage: Paste feature observations by date and plan.
Share the result or use it as a support note.

tools.name: Query Incident Brief
tools.persona: backend engineer or SRE handling database incidents
tools.problem: Backend engineers and SREs lose time during production database incidents because raw query notes and timeline fragments are hard to convert into an actionable summary.
tools.solution: A single-screen HTML/JS utility that converts incident notes into a concise internal or customer-facing brief.

result.summary: 1 incident brief generated from pasted notes with a modeled 48 minutes of daily time loss for this problem class.

usage: Use the summary for handoff or communication.

tools.name: Ops Issue Brief
tools.problem: Operational issue notes are converted into a compact brief, but the current repo state does not define a clear target persona or monetized value proposition.
tools.solution: A single-screen HTML/JS utility that turns operational notes into a compact brief.

result.summary: No verified numerical user-facing result is documented beyond one generated brief artifact.
